case_title: ALAN RESNIK VS. FIRST CHOICE MOVING DBA FIRST CHOICE MOVERS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST CHOICE MOVING LLC DBA FIRST CHOICE MOVERS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,440.02 FILED BY RESNIK, ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT FIRST CHOICE MOVING LLC DBA FIRST CHOICE MOVERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: DO NOT SATISFY JUDGMENT WITHOUT SUPERVISOR APPROVAL.
FILED NOTICE OF CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT FIRST CHOICE MOVING LLC DBA FIRST CHOICE MOVERS AS TO PLAINTIFF RESNIK, ALAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF ALAN RESNIK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FIRST CHOICE MOVING DBA CHIOCE MOVERS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BT LUIS HARNA, OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESNIK, ALAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRST CHOICE MOVING LLC DBA FIRST CHOICE MOVERS $544.02 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $619.02, DEFENDANTS' VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED. REGARDING THE REFRIGERATOR; IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF $2,909.24 OF THE JUDGMENT DEFENDANT MAY, AT DEFENDANTS' ELECTION, AND NOT LATER THAN NOVEMBER 30, 2017 RELEASE TO PLAINTIFF AT DEFENDANT'S LAS VEGAS ADDRESS THE REFRIGERATOR THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RESNIK, ALAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRST CHOICE MOVING LLC DBA FIRST CHOICE MOVERS $5,440.02 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,515.02, DEFENDANTS' VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF CHALLENGE TO VENUE MAILED TO ALL PARTIEWS. FILED BY DEFENDANT FIRST CHOICE MOVING LLC DBA FIRST CHOICE MOVERS AS TO PLAINTIFF RESNIK, ALAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
